title: ZkPassportProof
description: The ZK-passport-derived proof embedded inside DelegationToken.zkpassport_proof (canonical-JSON-then-base64). v0.2 replaces v0's opaque-stub field with a structurally cryptographic object whose four bindings (scope, nullifier, agent_key, predicates) the broker verifies. See ARCHITECTURE.md §8.5 and IDENTITY.md. The 'issuer_signature' here stands in for the SNARK verification of a real zkPassport circuit — see verify/zkpassport.py for the equivalence note.

scheme.description: Proof scheme identifier. v0.2 ships 'zkpassport.v1.test'; a real circuit-based scheme replaces this in v0.3.

issuer_key_id.description: Identifies which issuer pubkey the broker should resolve when verifying issuer_signature. v0.2 uses a hardcoded dev issuer; production looks up the ICAO CSCA pubkey by this id.

scope.description: Scope-bound identifier for nullifier derivation. MUST equal '<DelegationToken.domain>|<DelegationToken.scope>' (e.g. 'hearme.network|v1').

nullifier.description: base64 of 32 bytes. The scope-bound passport-derived nullifier. MUST equal DelegationToken.unique_identifier byte-for-byte.

agent_key_commitment.description: Hex SHA-256 over the 32 bytes of the agent's Ed25519 public key. Binds the proof to a specific agent — re-using a captured proof with a different agent_key fails this check.

predicate_commitment.description: Hex SHA-256 over canonical_json(DelegationToken.disclosed_predicates). Detects predicate tampering after issuance.

disclosed.description: Human-readable selectively-disclosed predicates. MUST equal DelegationToken.disclosed_predicates.

expires_at.description: Proof expiry. MUST be >= DelegationToken.expires_at so a still-valid delegation token can never reference an already-expired proof.

issuer_signature.description: base64 Ed25519 signature (64 bytes) over canonical_json(rest_of_object). The v0.2 stand-in for SNARK verification.
